title: Utilize SharedArrayBuffer and Atomics
description: Utilize `SharedArrayBuffer` for creating shared memory regions between execution contexts. Implement lock-free state synchronization using `Atomics` operations. Design high-performance data access patterns for shared binary data in multi-threaded Node.js applications.
objectives: Utilize `SharedArrayBuffer` for creating shared memory regions between execution contexts.
Implement lock-free state synchronization using `Atomics` operations.
Design high-performance data access patterns for shared binary data in multi-threaded Node.js applications.
